friendly_name: Fix Plan Mode FG and Batch Scoping
source_description: Plan mode FG availability and batch options are not correctly scoped to event recipe selections. Two bugs: (1) FG selection only shows FGs where ALL component recipes are selected, but should show FGs whose recipe is among the selected recipes - a single-recipe FG should appear if its recipe is selected. (2) Batch options section shows recipes/FGs from EventFinishedGood records that are stale - if a recipe was deselected, its FGs and batch options should no longer appear.
